macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Inflation Jumps to Highest Level Since 2023
items.summary: Consumer prices rose 3.8% year-over-year in April, marking the highest inflation rate in nearly three years, driven primarily by surging gasoline prices that have climbed from $2.80 to over $4 per gallon since the Iran conflict began in late February.

items.title: Fed Shifts Focus to Inflation Amid Energy Price Spike
items.summary: The Federal Reserve's attention has shifted from labor market concerns in 2025 to inflation in 2026 as energy prices spike due to geopolitical tensions, with key economic data expected this week.

items.title: Iran War Directly Impacts April Inflation Spike
items.summary: The ongoing conflict with Iran is identified as the primary driver of April's inflation increase, with energy costs being the main contributor to rising consumer prices.

items.title: UK Faces Recession Risk from Iran War and Energy Prices
items.summary: Britain could be pushed to the brink of recession due to the Iran conflict and elevated energy prices, with forecasts predicting a loss of 160,000 jobs amid slow economic growth.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Exceed $243 Million in 24 Hours as Longs Dominate Losses
items.summary: Heavy liquidations hit Bitcoin ($58.96M), Ethereum ($57.65M), and Solana ($10.6M) amid market volatility, with longs accounting for 75% of the $243M total across 91,568 traders. Binance saw the highest volume at $106M.

items.title: US Senate Banking Committee Proposes 100+ Amendments to Crypto Clarity Act Ahead of Vote
items.summary: Members of the US Senate Banking Committee have proposed over 100 amendments to the Clarity Act, with a vote scheduled for tomorrow, potentially impacting Bitcoin and broader crypto regulations.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Above $80,000 Amid Clarity Act Draft Release and Market Volatility
items.summary: Bitcoin traded between $79,844 and $81,325, stabilizing above $80K at around $81,170, buoyed by optimism from the US Senate's Clarity Act draft and ahead of Trump's China visit.

items.title: JPMorgan Plans Ethereum-Based Tokenized Fund for Stablecoin Management
items.summary: JPMorgan is launching a blockchain fund using Ethereum targeting institutional investors for stablecoin reserve management in the $32 billion market, expanding Wall Street into regulated blockchain finance.

items.title: Ethereum Loses Volatility as NEAR Leads Gains, Toncoin Biggest Loser
items.summary: Over the past 24 hours, top performers included NEAR (+5%), TRUMP (+3.8%), and Neo (+3.5%), while underperformers were Toncoin (-8%) and Theta, with Ethereum showing reduced volatility.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: Meta has recruited four OpenAI researchers—Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi, and Hongyu Ren—to bolster its AI team, according to a report citing a person familiar with the hires.

items.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT experiences outage
items.summary: Users reported issues with ChatGPT, including problems loading prompts, indicating a service disruption.

items.title: Apple to open AI technology to developers
items.summary: Apple plans to allow developers access to its underlying AI technology, potentially expanding its ecosystem.

items.title: US-UAE AI data campus deal not finalized
items.summary: Sources indicate that the multi-billion dollar US-UAE deal for an AI data campus remains far from completion.

items.title: One in three remote tech jobs vanished in past year
items.summary: Fully remote tech job postings in the US dropped sharply from 15% to 11% of total postings, with new postings at just 6%, amid AI and tech trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Black Desert Online Patch Adds Pearl Sale, New Costumes, and Node War Updates
items.summary: BDO's latest update features a Pearl sale, new best costume, thousands of Crons, 10x gathering event, Raging Fury suba armor, Adana rock elephant loot, world map UI improvements, and upcoming rift bosses with monsters appearing worldwide.

items.title: Star Wars: Fate of the Old Republic Revival Backed by $100M Investment from Veteran
items.summary: Ned East, a gaming veteran, raises $100 million through Greater Than Group to support the comeback of Star Wars: Fate of the Old Republic, led by Casey Hudson who promises release before 2030 with a development cycle under four years.

items.title: Battlefield 6 Season 3 Launches with Ranked Play for Redsec Mode and Elite Top 250
items.summary: Battlefield 6 introduces ranked play in 4v4 Redsec mode as part of Season 3 Redsec Update, with ongoing multiplayer grind streams aiming for max level, weapon mastery, new maps, and guns; battle pass delayed 30 minutes after launch.

items.title: Destiny 2: God Roll Valeda F Rocket Sidearm Available at Banshee for Less Than 24 Hours
items.summary: Banshee-44 offers a top-tier Valeda F with Snapshot Sights, Closing Time, Range Masterwork, and other perks, but the roll changes tomorrow night with the weekly reset, urging players to grab it quickly.

items.title: NBA 2K26 Patch Introduces Instant Speed Boost Using Back Paddles
items.summary: Post-patch update in NBA 2K26 enables a new instant speed boost technique by holding R2/RT and using back paddles for right stick canceling, making super speed boosts easier on controllers.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Samsung's One UI 9 beta rolls out for Galaxy S26 owners this week
items.summary: Samsung is launching the One UI 9 beta for Galaxy S26 owners, though its key features will launch with the final release.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold debuts as most advanced foldable
items.summary: Samsung unveils the Galaxy Z TriFold with a redesigned dual-hinge system, upgraded materials, and a 10-inch display that unfolds from a pocketable frame.

items.title: Google reveals list of Galaxy devices supporting AirDrop
items.summary: Google has announced which Galaxy devices will soon support Apple's AirDrop feature.

items.title: Amazon rolls out 30-minute delivery option in US cities
items.summary: Amazon Now is expanding to dozens of locations in 2026 with a new 30-minute delivery service.

items.title: Rivian rolls out AI-powered voice assistant to vehicles
items.summary: Rivian's new voice assistant is available on all Gen 1 and Gen 2 vehicles and upcoming R2 models.

items.title: AMD expands Ryzen PRO 9000 Series with commercial X3D processors
items.summary: AMD has added commercial X3D processors to its Ryzen PRO 9000 Series lineup.

items.title: Oppo Find X9 Ultra and Find X9s coming to India next week
items.summary: Oppo is launching the Find X9 Ultra and Find X9s smartphones in India soon.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July date leaked
items.summary: The date for Samsung's July Galaxy Unpacked event has leaked, hinting at major upcoming announcements.

items.title: ASUS teases retro-inspired 20th anniversary ROG Crosshair motherboard
items.summary: ASUS previews a new ROG Crosshair motherboard celebrating its 20th anniversary with retro design elements.

items.title: Microsoft patches 138 vulnerabilities including DNS and Netlogon RCE flaws
items.summary: Microsoft has released patches for 138 vulnerabilities, addressing critical remote code execution issues in DNS and Netlogon.

items.title: Qualcomm launches Snapdragon W5+ Gen 2 and W5 Gen 2 wearable platforms
items.summary: Qualcomm's new Snapdragon W5 platforms improve battery life, design, and connectivity for wearables.

items.title: Quantum Motion deploys first full-stack quantum computer using silicon chips
items.summary: Quantum Motion achieves milestone with a quantum computer built via standard silicon fabrication processes.
